data.content: Implemented ancestor-scoped terminal parent auto-resolution on the existing knots-bdfa branch, covering set_state/next, update, and terminal cascades. Validation passed with targeted app and CLI tests plus make sanity (607 unit tests, integration suite, 95.07% coverage). make install-hooks failed inside the Git worktree because the installer expects .git/hooks under a directory checkout, so I installed the managed pre-push hook from the primary checkout instead.
